_description: Baseline defect counts. Update when intentional classifier or content changes expected.
_seeded_from: May 8 generator dry-run, Words 26.5.0, min/max contrast classifier (run 25566533975)
_classifier_note: Baseline raised from 1b:1 to 1b:989 after TASK-10 classifier change. The old elif classifier skipped 1b when Class 1 fired; the new min/max contrast classifier fires both on mixed-indent fences. 989 is correct for Words 26.5.0 fresh DocFX output.
